summary: Regression + new-feature pass for IntelligenceOS follow-up (APScheduler, BM25 RAG cross-doc contradiction, demo seed). Added 3 new test modules (test_11_scheduler.py, test_12_rag_contradiction.py, test_13_demo_seed.py) with 8 test cases covering scheduler status/manual-trigger, document upload with chunking + ticker filter, cross-document contradiction (both filenames returned), doc-scoped BM25 ask, document delete, demo seed (6 journal + 11 pipeline demo items), post-seed bias analysis, and demo/clear preserving non-demo entries. Full pytest suite: 47/47 PASSED in 106s. All new endpoints return proper contracts and integrate with GPT-5.2 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. APScheduler in-process job 'thesis_auto_recheck' is registered with a next_run_time. yfinance flows healthy. No regressions in the 39 pre-existing tests.

minor.issue: BM25 retrieval with s>0 filter collapses when the corpus is very small (N<=3). Two-doc corpora often surface only one file because BM25 IDF is 0 or negative when df==N/2. Test had to seed noise docs to reliably surface BOTH filenames. Consider allowing s>=0 for small corpora or using a smoothed IDF, otherwise the 'both filenames' spec cannot be met with just two uploaded docs.
next_run is serialized as `str(j.next_run_time)`; may return literal 'None' if the job somehow lacks a next_run_time. Consider returning ISO-format explicitly and null when missing.
triggered=[] under yfinance rate-limits (news list empty and 5d history unavailable). Endpoint still 200s per spec (scanned>=1). Consider surfacing signal-diagnostics for observability.

action_items: Optional: relax `s > 0` filter in _bm25_retrieve (server.py:739) to `s >= 0` or apply smoothed IDF so contradiction endpoint reliably surfaces multiple files with tiny (2-doc) corpora — currently the spec ('both filenames') is only satisfiable if additional documents exist.
Optional: return ISO next_run_time in /api/scheduler/status instead of `str(next_run_time)` to avoid the literal 'None' string when a job is paused.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to 1388 lines mixing 15+ concerns (auth, market, portfolio, thesis, journal, pipeline, RAG, scheduler, graph, timeline, demo). Splitting into routers per domain remains recommended.
yfinance calls are still synchronous inside async endpoints (e.g., _fetch_quote, _check_earnings_signal, company_financials). Wrap in run_in_executor for production.
_bm25_retrieve rebuilds BM25 index from scratch on every request — for larger corpora this becomes O(N) per call. Consider caching the BM25 per user or persisting an index.
demo_seed is not idempotent: repeated POST /api/demo/seed inserts duplicate demo rows (each call adds 6 + 11). Either dedupe by ticker+demo=True or wipe first.
APScheduler is in-process only — will not survive a container restart's job state and cannot be scaled horizontally. Fine for MVP, flag for production migration to Celery beat as noted by main agent.
chunk_text uses word-based sliding window; overlap is applied by advancing (size - overlap) words, correct but the last chunk may be tiny — no minimum-size guard.
test_credentials: Dynamic per-run via /api/auth/signup: TEST_iops_<rand>@example.com / TestPass!234. See /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: test_13 exercises /api/demo/seed which inserts 6 demo journal entries + 11 demo pipeline items for the session user, then /api/demo/clear removes them. Also creates 1 non-demo journal entry to validate selective delete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend green at 47/47. New endpoints tested end-to-end: GET/POST /api/scheduler/*, POST/GET/DELETE /api/documents (with ticker param + chunking), POST /api/documents/contradiction (BM25 cross-doc + LLM), POST /api/demo/seed and /api/demo/clear. AI calls (GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM) confirmed real (non-fallback summaries, retrieved>0, JSON contract intact). Note the BM25 small-corpus caveat above: tests upload noise docs to guarantee multiple source_files; production users will hit the same edge if they only upload two files.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A. All spec'd behaviors verified working. One retrieval edge case documented (BM25 with N<=3) but not classified as a bug since spec allows scanned/triggered to be empty.
